scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.build: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client && npm run db:deploy --prefix server
scripts.start: cd server && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate deploy && NODE_ENV=production node src/index.js
scripts.render-build: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
